title: Qbeh-1: The Atlas Cube
description:
Some games are made to be beaten. QBEH-1 is made to be felt.

Step into a series of breathtaking first-person worlds, each with its own visual identity and atmosphere. Place and remove special cubes to solve environmental puzzles, uncover hidden secrets tucked into every corner, and move at your own pace through one of the most visually distinctive puzzle platformers on Steam. 

There are no timers. No combat. No pressure. Just you, the world, and the quiet satisfaction of figuring it out.

Handcrafted Worlds

• Multiple divergent worlds, each with a completely unique visual style and puzzle set

• Secrets and hidden areas reward curious players who explore beyond the obvious path

• An original atmospheric soundtrack that adapts to each world

Create & Share

• Full in-game level editor — build your own worlds from scratch

• Steam Workshop integration — share your levels and play thousands created by the community

• One of the few puzzle platformers on Steam with genuine user-generated content support

For the Right Kind of Player

• Perfect for fans of atmospheric, non-combat puzzle games like Portal, The Witness, and Manifold Garden

• Accessible enough for casual players, deep enough for puzzle enthusiasts

• A genuine stress reliever — reviewers consistently describe it as one of the most calming games on Steam
description_short: A serene first-person puzzle platformer set across strikingly beautiful worlds. Place and remove cubes to solve handcrafted puzzles, discover hidden secrets, and lose yourself in an atmosphere unlike anything else. Includes a full level editor and Steam Workshop support.

upsells.name: Qbeh-1: The Atlas Cube - Official Soundtrack
